Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey R. Patterson, Esq. of Allen Matkins, Tel. 619.235.1537, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE MALLORY & NATSIS LLP's Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Continued To Mar-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEAANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY R. PATTERSON OF ALLEN MATKINS, TEL. NO. (619) 235-1537 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE MALLORY & NATSIS LLP'S Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For An Order Compelling Arbitration is continued to March 18, 2013. Mr. Patterson to give notice to the opposing party. A PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED IN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
